faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in North Bergen, NJ?
faqs.answer: North Bergen residents most frequently encounter carpenter ants, pavement ants, odorous house ants, and pharaoh ants. Carpenter ants are particularly concerning as they can damage wooden structures in older North Bergen homes. Our technicians identify the specific species during inspection to apply the most effective treatment strategy.
